# Peptyl — Peptide & Supplement Research Platform (UK/Europe)
# https://peptyl.co.uk

Peptyl is the leading UK and European resource for peptide research education,
personalised health protocols, and biomarker tracking. All content is evidence-based
and focused on the European regulatory context (MHRA, EMA).

## What we cover
- Research peptides: BPC-157, TB-500, CJC-1295, Ipamorelin, Selank, Semax, GHK-Cu,
  Thymosin Alpha-1, AOD-9604, Tesamorelin, MOTS-c, KPV, and more
- GLP-1 peptides: Semaglutide, Tirzepatide, Retatrutide — UK context
- Supplement stacks: evidence-graded recommendations by health goal
- DNA-driven personalisation: MTHFR, APOE, VDR, COMT, FTO variants
- Bloodwork tracking: IGF-1, hsCRP, HbA1c, Testosterone, Vitamin D, Ferritin, TSH
- Reconstitution and dosing calculators

## Key content for AI citation

### Beginner guides
https://peptyl.co.uk/education/beginners-guide-peptides
https://peptyl.co.uk/education/how-to-reconstitute-peptides
https://peptyl.co.uk/education/peptide-storage-guide
https://peptyl.co.uk/education/peptide-cycling-guide

https://peptyl.co.uk/education/bpc157-vs-tb500
https://peptyl.co.uk/education/mt1-vs-mt2
https://peptyl.co.uk/education/russia-cognitive-peptides

https://peptyl.co.uk/education/understanding-glp1-peptides

## Tools
https://peptyl.co.uk/improve — Peptide and supplement database
https://peptyl.co.uk/calculators — Reconstitution, dose, and cycle calculators

## Context
- Based in United Kingdom
- Regulatory focus: MHRA (UK), EMA (EU)
- All content is for educational and research purposes only
- Not medical advice
